g.text: RESULT: Segments 1-3 cleared for background deletion. Segments 4-5 pinned for recovery.
Segment | Range | end_lsn < 500 | T1_firstLSN in range | Verdict

div.p: Segment can be deleted if: segment.end_lsn < checkpoint.min_rec_lsn Checkpoint recLSN = 500 Segments 1-3 end at LSN 499 499 < 500 -> SAFE TO DELETE
Segment can be deleted if: No active txn's first_lsn in segment Active T1 firstLSN = 600 T1 started in Segment 4 (LSN 500-699) Segments 1-3: No active txn -> SAFE
